title: Archandrian Textures
description: A small QoL resource pack that smooths out the visuals, helps tell similar-looking items apart, and adds a subtle glow.
body:
# Archandrian Textures
A small pack that enhances Minecraft's visuals without going too far from the default look.
 — making similar-looking items easier to tell apart and adding glow or texture tweaks that make everything just feel a little nicer.


## Features
(Last updated: April 2025)

 Glowing Armor Trims — Subtle emissive effects using vanilla core shaders, no mods needed.

 Better Item Differentiation — Visual tweaks to items that look too similar (like discs).

 Slight Visual Polish — Improved shading, smoother contrast, and minor texture touches for   making stuff make more sense(netherite colours) and for a more cohesive look.

 Vanilla Friendly — No mod dependencies. Shader support is built-in and fully compatible with vanilla Minecraft.

🔄 Lightweight & Modular — Easy to expand or combine with other resource packs.

(just for your information the pack has not been completly tested exept for 1.21.5. All other versions Should also work but arent completly checked- that means that some features like glowing entity eyes might not work)

For everyones information the pack doesnt require optifine
